title: Vibrant Visuals Panorama
description: Bringing Bedrock's Vibrant Visuals to Java's title screen!
body:
---

![Vibrant Visuals Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d0e6f847535eda1ace9c918a3f442c398ed1141.png)

---

This resource pack brings the Vibrant Visuals Panorama from Bedrock Edition into Java Edition, transforming the main menu with a brighter and more immersive look. The enhanced visuals create a polished, dynamic atmosphere that makes starting the game feel fresh every time.

---

![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sjTe0ebP/images/22dcccc790ff35687bc9901ad919f83a69008488.png)

---
